name: Zenith Energy
longBusinessSummary: Zenith Energy Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, development and production of oil and natural gas in Tunisia, Italy, and internationally. It is also involved in the production of condensate and electricity assets; oil and gas drilling; and oil trading activity, as well as software development. The company was formerly known as Canoel International Energy Ltd. and changed its name to Zenith Energy Ltd. in October 2014. Zenith Energy Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
